## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's capabilities and how they can support Imubit's content strategy and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX produces \~50,000 words/month (7-8 articles/week) for Imubit, including editorial content and link building](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX handles end-to-end content creation, from ideation to publishing on Imubit's website](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Imubit is shifting messaging from "closed loop only" to a more open platform approach, requiring content updates](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [A new messaging framework and content mapping strategy are being developed to align with sales process and personas](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Production Capabilities

  - [Produce \~50,000 words/month, translating to 7-8 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Handle programmatic and editorial content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Conduct keyword research with an SEO component](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Manage end-to-end process from ideation to publishing on Imubit's website](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Have created \~140 articles to date, all connecting to Imubit's landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Utilize internal link building team for additional SEO support](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Focus on both process-level and vertical-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Utilize long-tail keywords for reaching specific verticals (e.g., "sustainability for cement industry")](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Assess and potentially refresh legacy content for SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Creating a bank of product images for use in articles and on the website](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Developing middle-of-funnel content to better explain Imubit's solution](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Website and Messaging Updates

  - [Reviewing website to shift messaging from "closed loop only" to a more open platform approach](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Developing a comprehensive messaging framework including purpose, brand story, pillars, and usage guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Updating content to avoid potential negative connotations (e.g., replacing "governance" with "orchestrate" or "guides")](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Considering a platform change from current hosting to potentially Webflow for improved reliability](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

### Content Mapping and Sales Alignment

  - [Planning to map content to industries, personas, and sales process stages](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Aim to provide sales team with targeted content based on prospect's industry, persona, and stage in the buying process](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

### Collaboration and Resources

  - [GrowthX team to proactively flag any needs or issues to Imubit](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Imubit to potentially provide access to sales call recordings (Otter) for GrowthX team to better understand objections and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [GrowthX utilizing existing resources like objection sheets and sales enablement materials to inform content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share detailed contract information and weekly production specifics in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [GrowthX to create an executive summary of tone and voice guidelines for content](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Tara to investigate possibility of providing GrowthX access to sales call recordings](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Imubit to continue exploring new website hosting options and potential platform change](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate new messaging framework into content creation process once available](https://fathom.video/share/RQBwAMyghJAznxXm_YGFpitMijstpSfV?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
